items.d: The time early in the morning when many children go to school.
items.s: School begins at ___ in the morning, so we go in.
items.hintDe: Diese Zeit ist früh am Morgen.

items.d: The time when the clock shows the small number and no minutes.
items.s: The clock shows ___, with no minutes more.
items.hintDe: Die Uhr zeigt genau 9, ohne Minuten dazu.

items.d: The time late in the evening when many children go to bed.
items.s: My favourite programme is on at ___ in the evening.
items.hintDe: Diese Zeit ist am Abend.

provenance.sbRef: SB Unit 11 story: 'Something amazing!'

items.d: Very, very good — so good that you go wow!
items.s: Tim has got something ___ for Suzy in the park.
items.hintDe: Sehr, sehr gut – so toll, dass du staunst.

provenance.sbRef: MORE Words: 'Bedtime is at ten o'clock.'

items.d: The time at night when you go to sleep.
items.s: It's 9 o'clock at night, so it is ___ for the children.
items.hintDe: Die Zeit am Abend, wenn du ins Bett gehst.

provenance.sbRef: MORE Words: 'At a quarter to nine, I have a break.'

items.d: A short time in school when you eat and play.
items.s: At a quarter to nine we have a ___ and eat something.
items.hintDe: Eine kurze Zeit in der Schule, in der du isst und spielst.

provenance.sbRef: SB Unit 11 story: 'And hide behind the bush.'

items.d: A small plant with many leaves, smaller than a tree.
items.s: The dog is hiding behind the big ___ in the park.
items.hintDe: Eine kleine Pflanze mit vielen Blättern, kleiner als ein Baum.

provenance.sbRef: MORE Words: 'My clock shows the wrong time.'

items.d: A thing on the wall that shows you the time.
items.s: I look at the ___ on the wall to get the time.
items.hintDe: Ein Ding an der Wand, das dir die Zeit zeigt.

provenance.sbRef: SB Unit 11: 'I can't remember. Give me a clue.'

items.d: A little help so you can find the answer.
items.s: I can't find the answer. Please give me a ___!
items.hintDe: Eine kleine Hilfe, damit du die Antwort findest.

provenance.sbRef: SB Unit 11: 'we do our daily exercise outside.'

items.d: Happening every day.
items.s: At a quarter to ten we do our ___ exercise outside.
items.hintDe: Etwas, das jeden Tag passiert.

provenance.sbRef: SB Unit 11: 'Excuse me, what's the time?'

items.d: Nice words for somebody before you ask them something.
items.s: ___ What time is it, please?
items.hintDe: So sprichst du jemanden höflich an, bevor du fragst.

provenance.sbRef: SB Unit 11: 'we do our daily exercise outside.'

items.d: When you run and jump to make your body healthy.
items.s: Running and jumping outside are good ___ for you.
items.hintDe: Wenn du läufst und springst, um deinen Körper gesund zu halten.

provenance.sbRef: MORE Words: 'I like to read comics in my free time.'

items.d: When you have no school and can do what you like.
items.s: In my ___ I like to read a book or ride my bike.
items.hintDe: Zeit, in der du keine Schule hast und machen kannst, was du magst.

provenance.sbRef: SB Unit 11: 'The train leaves in half an hour.'

items.d: 30 minutes.
items.s: The train comes in ___, so we wait 30 minutes.
items.hintDe: 30 Minuten.

items.d: 30 minutes after the clock shows 9.
items.s: I have my breakfast at ___, 30 minutes after 9.
items.hintDe: Es ist 30 Minuten nach 9.

provenance.sbRef: SB Unit 11 story: 'Have fun!' says John.

items.d: Nice words for somebody who is going to do something good.
items.s: You're going to the park? ___ See you soon!
items.hintDe: Das sagst du jemandem, der etwas Schönes vorhat.

provenance.sbRef: SB Unit 11: 'Hurry up.'

items.d: Words for somebody who must be fast.
items.s: ___ The train leaves in five minutes!
items.hintDe: So sagst du jemandem, dass er schnell sein soll.

items.d: Words for the time when the clock shows ten in the morning.
items.s: ___ in the morning, and our English class begins now.
items.hintDe: So sagst du, dass es 10 Uhr am Vormittag ist.

items.d: Words for the time when the clock shows eight in the evening.
items.s: ___ in the evening, and it is night outside now.
items.hintDe: So sagst du, dass es 8 Uhr am Abend ist.

provenance.sbRef: SB Unit 11 story: 'There's a knock at the door.'

items.d: The noise when somebody puts a hand on a door again and again.
items.s: There's a ___ at the door. Somebody is here.
items.hintDe: Das Geräusch, wenn jemand mit der Hand an die Tür klopft.

provenance.sbRef: SB Unit 11 story: 'Suzy is sitting in the living room.'

items.d: The place where you sit and watch TV with the family.
items.s: Mum is watching TV in the ___.
items.hintDe: Der Raum zu Hause, wo du sitzt und fernsiehst.

items.d: The time in the day when the clock shows 12 and we often have lunch.
items.s: We have lunch at ___, when the clock shows 12.
items.hintDe: Es ist 12 Uhr am Tag.

items.d: The time when the clock shows 12 late at night.
items.s: It is very late at night. The clock shows ___.
items.hintDe: Es ist 12 Uhr in der Nacht.

provenance.sbRef: SB Unit 11: 'We always do our exercise outside.'

items.d: Not in a room, but in the open air.
items.s: It is a nice day. Let's play ___ in the park!
items.hintDe: Nicht in einem Zimmer, sondern an der frischen Luft.

provenance.sbRef: SB Unit 11: 'Can you come to my place?'

items.d: The home where somebody lives.
items.s: Can you come to my ___ after school today?
items.hintDe: Der Ort, wo jemand wohnt.

provenance.sbRef: MORE Words: 'I'm watching a great TV programme.'

items.d: A show that you watch on TV.
items.s: There is a great ___ on TV at 7 o'clock.
items.hintDe: Eine Sendung, die du im Fernsehen anschaust.

items.d: 15 minutes after the clock shows 9.
items.s: It is ___, so it is 15 minutes after 9.
items.hintDe: Es ist 15 Minuten nach 9.

items.d: 15 minutes before the clock shows 10.
items.s: It is ___, 15 minutes before 10. Let's hurry!
items.hintDe: Es ist 15 Minuten vor 10.

provenance.sbRef: SB Unit 11 song: 'I'm walking down the road.'

items.d: A long way where cars go from place to place.
items.s: I'm walking down the ___ to the park.
items.hintDe: Ein langer Weg, auf dem Autos fahren.

provenance.sbRef: SB Unit 11 postcard: 'See you soon, Robert'

items.d: Nice words for a friend at the end, before going away.
items.s: I have to go now. ___ Call me tomorrow!
items.hintDe: Das sagst du einem Freund, wenn du gehst und ihn bald wiedersiehst.

provenance.sbRef: SB Unit 11 story: 'Tim has got a surprise for Suzy.'

items.d: Something nice that you did not get before.
items.s: Tim has got a ___ for Suzy. She is happy!
items.hintDe: Etwas Schönes, von dem du vorher nichts gewusst hast.

provenance.sbRef: SB Unit 11 ex 14: 'He's sending a text message.'

items.d: A short note that you get on your phone.
items.s: I got a ___ from my friend on my phone.
items.hintDe: Eine kurze Nachricht, die du auf dein Handy bekommst.

provenance.sbRef: SB Unit 11 story: 'Answer the door, Suzy!'

items.d: To go and open up when somebody knocks.
items.s: Somebody is at the door. Can you ___, please?
items.hintDe: Zur Tür gehen und sie aufmachen, wenn jemand klopft.

items.d: To make food on the hot stove.
items.s: My dad likes to ___ pizza for dinner.
items.hintDe: Du machst Essen auf dem Herd.

provenance.sbRef: MORE Words: 'My mum cooks great spaghetti.'

items.d: To make a hot dinner for the family to eat.
items.s: My mum likes to ___ a big dinner for the family.
items.hintDe: Ein warmes Abendessen für die Familie machen.

provenance.sbRef: MORE Words: 'I go to bed at nine o'clock.'

items.d: To get in and sleep at night.
items.s: I always ___ at nine o'clock at night.
items.hintDe: Am Abend ins Bett gehen, um zu schlafen.

provenance.sbRef: MORE Words: 'Sarah goes to school at a quarter to eight.'

items.d: To walk in the morning to your class and study.
items.s: Mary likes to ___ at a quarter to eight every day.
items.hintDe: Am Morgen in die Schule gehen, um zu lernen.

provenance.sbRef: SB Unit 11 story: 'hide behind the bush'

items.d: To go behind a tree or a bush so your friends can't find you.
items.s: Let's ___ behind the big tree in the park.
items.hintDe: Dorthin gehen, wo dich niemand sehen kann.

provenance.sbRef: SB Unit 11: 'We're late. Let's hurry.'

items.d: To do something very fast.
items.s: We are late! Let's ___ to school.
items.hintDe: Etwas sehr schnell machen.

provenance.sbRef: SB Unit 11 ex 14: 'She's looking after her cat.'

items.d: To give food and help to a pet or a child.
items.s: Can you ___ my dog for a week? I am away.
items.hintDe: Einem Haustier oder Kind Essen geben und helfen.

items.d: To have fun on a screen in your free time.
items.s: My friend likes to ___ on his computer in the evening.
items.hintDe: Du spielst Spiele am Computer.

items.d: To kick a ball with your feet in a team game.
items.s: The boys like to ___ in the park after school.
items.hintDe: Du schießt mit dem Fuß einen Ball.

items.d: To make music on a big thing with white and black keys.
items.s: She can ___ very well. The music is great!
items.hintDe: Du machst Musik auf den schwarzen und weißen Tasten.

provenance.sbRef: SB Unit 11: 'The cat pushes the skateboard down the park.'

items.d: To move something away from you with your hands.
items.s: ___ the big door with both hands to open it.
items.hintDe: Etwas mit den Händen von dir weg bewegen.

items.d: To go on a thing with two wheels that you push with your feet.
items.s: In my free time I like to ___ in the park.
items.hintDe: Du sitzt auf zwei Rädern und trittst in die Pedale.

items.d: To sit on a big farm animal and go on it.
items.s: My sister goes to the farm to ___ every Sunday.
items.hintDe: Du sitzt auf einem Pferd und reitest.

items.d: To go on a thing with two small wheels, with one foot down.
items.s: She likes to ___ to the park on two small wheels.
items.hintDe: Du stehst auf einem Roller und stößt dich mit einem Fuß ab.

provenance.sbRef: SB Unit 11 ex 15: 'He's skating.'

items.d: To go on the ice with special shoes on your feet.
items.s: When it is cold we go on the ice to ___ with our friends.
items.hintDe: Du läufst mit besonderen Schuhen über das Eis.

items.d: To go on a small board with four wheels under it.
items.s: Tim likes to ___ in the park with his friends.
items.hintDe: Du fährst auf einem kleinen Brett mit vier Rädern.

provenance.sbRef: SB Unit 11 postcard: 'Mum and Dad are skiing.'

items.d: To go down the snow on two long boards on your feet.
items.s: When it snows, Mum and Dad like to ___ down the snow.
items.hintDe: Du fährst auf zwei langen Brettern den Schnee hinunter.

provenance.sbRef: SB Unit 11 postcard: 'it's snowing.'

items.d: When soft white ice comes down from the sky.
items.s: Look! It is cold and it is ___.
items.hintDe: Wenn weißer Schnee vom Himmel fällt.

provenance.sbRef: SB Unit 11 postcard: 'Jack's snowboarding.'

items.d: To go down the snow on one wide board, with both feet on it.
items.s: Jack likes to ___ down the snow on one big board.
items.hintDe: Du fährst mit beiden Füßen auf einem breiten Brett den Schnee hinunter.

provenance.sbRef: MORE Words: 'I study art and drawing.'

items.d: To read a lot for a test at school.
items.s: I need to ___ for my big English test tomorrow.
items.hintDe: Für die Schule lesen und etwas lernen.

provenance.sbRef: MORE Words: 'My dad plays a loud song to wake me up.'

items.d: To make a sleeping child or adult open their eyes.
items.s: Mum has to ___ in the morning because I sleep a lot.
items.hintDe: Jemanden, der schläft, wach machen.

items.d: To look at programmes on the big screen at your place.
items.s: After dinner we like to ___ in the living room.
items.hintDe: Du schaust dir Sendungen auf dem Bildschirm an.

provenance.sbRef: MORE Words: 'I hope the weather is nice tomorrow.'

items.d: If it is cold, nice, or it snows outside.
items.s: The ___ is nice today, so let's go to the park.
items.hintDe: Ob es draußen kalt, schön ist oder schneit.

provenance.sbRef: SB Unit 11 ex 2: 'What's the time?'

items.d: You ask this to find out how late it is.
items.s: ___ — It's half past nine now.
items.hintDe: So fragst du, was die Uhr zeigt.

provenance.sbRef: SB Unit 11: 'Excuse me, what time is it?'

items.d: You ask this to get the hour from a clock right now.
items.s: ___ I don't want to be late!
items.hintDe: So fragst du, wie spät es gerade ist.
